name: Nikema Williams
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $343,447 for Nikema Williams in U.S. House, GA-05. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
